summary: Authored a 2-phase closure plan for task 80. Research (report 01) already completed all live verification (9/9 contract rows PASS, exact --account <gmail|logos> enum confirmed, live Logos census + read-only/dry-run /email --logos exercise proven), so the plan does NOT re-verify. Phase 1 authors a single self-contained, /spawn-ready closure report at summaries/01_phase6-closure-report.md (doubling as the task summary AND the nvim handoff) with six required sections: status banner, rows-1-9 verdict table with exact enum, wrapper-contracts.md-ready folder-token + mbsync + no-new-binaries table, live exercise results, an explicit WHAT-THE-NVIM-AGENT-MUST-DO checklist, and cross-repo source pointers. Phase 2 verifies the report is non-empty, self-contained (no back-references), and internally consistent. No nix build, no nvim-repo edits, no --execute mutation.

artifacts.summary: 2-phase plan (1h): Phase 1 authors the self-contained /spawn-ready Phase-6 closure report (six sections sourced verbatim from research report 01); Phase 2 verifies self-containment and internal consistency. Deliverable written to summaries/01_phase6-closure-report.md.
